message.content:
{"analysis":"The program renders a high-resolution image (800x600) and writes it as image.ppm. It shows progress percentages. Let me examine the output file and look for more clues about the rendering algorithm in the strings.","plan":"1. Check the PPM file that was generated
2. Look at the first few bytes/lines of image.ppm
3. Extract more relevant strings from the binary
4. Try to find format strings that reveal the rendering algorithm","commands":[{"keystrokes":"ls -la /app/image.ppm
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"head -c 500 /app/image.ppm
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"head -3 /app/image.ppm
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"wc -c /app/image.ppm
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"strings -n 4 /app/mystery | grep -iE 'sphere|ray|trace|render|light|scene|color|pixel|image|ppm|mandel|fractal|julia|gradient|circle|plane|reflect|shadow|diffuse|ambient|specular|normal|camera|intersect|render|progress|resolution|downsample|ffmpeg|high' | head -50
","duration":0.1}]}
